goal: Given the .github/workflows/nightly.yml dream-cycle job, when it runs on schedule, then harvest -> forge -> close-loop -> defrag -> metrics health complete, the report artifact uploads, and the rolling GitHub issue is updated with a compounding summary (>=1 automated consolidation run per week).
narrative: A user or evaluator exercises the system behavior for this goal: Given the .github/workflows/nightly.yml dream-cycle job, when it runs on schedule, then harvest -> forge -> close-loop -> defrag -> metrics health complete, the report artifact uploads, and the rolling GitHub issue is updated with a compounding summary (>=1 automated consolidation run per week)..
expected_outcome: The implementation satisfies the goal in observable behavior: Given the .github/workflows/nightly.yml dream-cycle job, when it runs on schedule, then harvest -> forge -> close-loop -> defrag -> metrics health complete, the report artifact uploads, and the rolling GitHub issue is updated with a compounding summary (>=1 automated consolidation run per week)..
